trigger: none

pool:
  name: Default
  demands:
  - msbuild
  - visualstudio

stages:
- template: azure-function-build.yml
  parameters:
    azureServiceConnection: 'Azure ELZ DE Dev'
    backendVariableGroup: 'Terraform ELZ Dev Backend'
    buildSolution: 'src/WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices/*.sln'
    publishProjects: 'src/WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices/WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions/*.csproj'

- template: azure-function-deploy.yml
  parameters:
    workspace: 'dev'
    dependsOn: [Build]
    azureServiceConnection: 'Azure ELZ DE Dev'
    backendVariableGroup: 'Terraform ELZ Dev Backend'
    functionAppName: 'fn-deceasedestate-dev'
    functionPackage: '$(Pipeline.Workspace)/drop/s.zip'
    resourceGroup: 't3-syd-d365cn-DeceasedEstate-dev-arg'

- template: azure-function-deploy.yml
  parameters:
    workspace: 'test'
    dependsOn: [dev]
    azureServiceConnection: 'Azure ELZ DE Test'
    backendVariableGroup: 'Terraform ELZ Test Backend'
    functionAppName: 'fn-deceasedestate-test'
    functionPackage: '$(Pipeline.Workspace)/drop/s.zip'
    resourceGroup: 't3-syd-d365cn-DeceasedEstate-test-arg'

- template: azure-function-deploy.yml
  parameters:
    workspace: 'uat'
    dependsOn: [test]
    azureServiceConnection: 'Azure ELZ DE Uat'
    backendVariableGroup: 'Terraform ELZ Uat Backend'
    functionAppName: 'fn-deceasedestate-uat'
    functionPackage: '$(Pipeline.Workspace)/drop/s.zip'
    resourceGroup: 't3-syd-d365cn-DeceasedEstate-uat-arg'
